summary.notes: Backend: 28/28 pass (exit 0). Frontend: 941/945 pass across full suite. BUG-001 (TC-021) and BUG-002 (TC-024) resolved. Remaining 2 failures are pre-existing unrelated bugs: TC-003 (useAgentCompletion confirmBetweenStages logic, BUG-006) and TC-003b (TaskCard aria-label/attachment/clamp regressions, BUG-003/004/005). Zero Critical or High unresolved bugs — merge gate APPROVED.

performance.notes: No load testing performed. All new endpoints are file-read or in-memory prompt generation. Existing P95 < 500ms baseline applies.

owasp_checks.notes: Stage prompt endpoint uses integer stageIndex from URL — no path traversal surface.
No sensitive data stored in prompt files beyond task title and agent instructions.
buildStagePrompt constructs prompt via string template from trusted data sources; no user HTML/SQL injection path.
No new HTTP headers introduced; existing header policy unchanged.
Endpoints follow existing auth model (local tool, no external auth).

test_cases.description: buildStagePrompt returns { promptText, estimatedTokens } shape
test_cases.notes: Backend test suite, 28 tests all pass

test_cases.description: buildStagePrompt includes task title in promptText
buildStagePrompt estimatedTokens ≈ promptText.length / 4
buildStagePrompt includes MANDATORY COMPILE GATE for developer-agent
buildStagePrompt does NOT include compile gate for non-developer agents
buildStagePrompt returns fallback prompt when task not found
stagePromptPath() helper path pattern
GET .../stages/0/prompt returns 200 text/plain when file exists
GET .../stages/0/prompt returns 404 PROMPT_NOT_AVAILABLE when file missing
GET .../stages/0/prompt returns 404 RUN_NOT_FOUND for unknown runId
POST /runs/preview-prompts returns all stage entries with correct shape
POST /agent/prompt response includes promptFull field
POST /agent/prompt response includes promptPreview (first 500 chars)
AgentPromptPreview renders nothing when preparedRun is null
AgentPromptPreview renders full prompt in read mode
AgentPromptPreview Collapse/Show full toggle
AgentPromptPreview edit mode textarea starts with promptFull
AgentPromptPreview token badge formats correctly
PipelineConfirmModal renders Preview Prompts button
PipelineConfirmModal calls previewPipelinePrompts on click
PipelineLogToggle is NOT rendered when pipelineState is null
test_cases.notes: BUG-001 RESOLVED: PipelineLogToggle now returns null when pipelineState === null. All 7 tests in PipelineLogToggle.test.tsx pass.

test_cases.description: PipelineLogToggle IS rendered when pipelineState is non-null
Board loads at http://localhost:3000 with no critical JS errors
test_cases.notes: Playwright: page title=Prism, only 404 favicon.ico error (not critical)

test_cases.description: AgentLauncherMenu shows Run Full Pipeline option in dropdown
test_cases.notes: BUG-002 RESOLVED: label changed to 'Run Full Pipeline'. All 22 tests in AgentLauncherMenu.test.tsx pass.
